title: Thirty-third judicial district
doc_html:
§621.33.  Thirty-third judicial district

The thirty-third judicial district court shall have two judges.

Added by Acts 1968, No. 694; Acts 2001, No. 240, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2002.
doc_text:
§621.33.  Thirty-third judicial district
The thirty-third judicial district court shall have two judges.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 694; Acts 2001, No. 240, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2002.
